name: FETAL CARDIAC DYSRHYTHMIAS
definition: PAC = most common benign rhythm abnormality intermittent conduction with a ventricular rate as a submultiple of the atrial rate

demographics.Etiology: viral infection, hypoplasia of sinoatrial tract

dominant_finding: transient bradycardia ← atrial bigeminy if every other beat is nonconducted
discriminating_features: transient bradycardia ← atrial bigeminy if every other beat is nonconducted

general: transient bradycardia ← atrial bigeminy if every other beat is nonconducted
M-mode echocardiography with simultaneous visualization of atrial + ventricular
normal heart rate + rhythm (not reportedly diagnosed in utero)
a few atrial contractions → NOT followed by a ventricular contraction
atrial contraction NOT followed by a ventricular contraction in a constant
slow atrial + ventricular contractions independent from each other
